name: agentic-sdlc-codex-plugin
description: A Codex plugin for contract-driven agentic SDLC execution with a shared Git-first project knowledge base.

interface.longDescription: Agentic SDLC turns a classic software development life cycle into an agent-legible operating system: each phase is governed by a contract, validated by gates, and recorded in a Git-first knowledge base that teams and agents can share in parallel.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic SDLC to initialize this project.
Create an SDLC contract for the next phase.
Check the SDLC gate for my active story.
